Careers

Thank you for your interest in the Prince Edward County Memorial Hospital Foundation!




Please check back for future opportunities.


At Prince Edward County Memorial Hospital Foundation, we value everyone’s unique journey. We are committed to equity, diversity and inclusion, and welcome applications from all qualified persons. We encourage women, First Nations, Métis and Inuit persons, members of visible minority groups, persons with disabilities, persons of any sexual orientation or gender identity and expression, and all those who may contribute to the further diversification of ideas at PECMH Foundation to apply.

In Support Of:

Our Hospital. Our Legacy.
